name: The Lost Pharaoh
dialogue: Khepri tested your patience. Seshat tested your reason. Sekhmet-Ra tested your fire.
All three reported. All three said the same word.
I have slept a long time, trainer. I am awake now. Let us see if 'worthy' was a lie.
Strike like the sun. I will strike like the tomb.
preBattleLine: The Pharaoh's crown ignites with a slow, ancient light. The room remembers his name.
postDefeatDialogue: The Pharaoh laughs — not a king's laugh, a friend's.
"The desert is yours. The hieroglyphs are yours. The trial is closed."
"Carry my mark on every PicMon you make from this day. The Tomb remembers."
prereqBlockedMessage: The Pharaoh does not stir. Three trial-guardians must speak your name first.
